importantVotes.title: Potrero Yard Modernization Project — $1.4B P3 Agreement
importantVotes.description: Approves a 30-year public-private partnership agreement with PRG-Potrero Properties LLC to design, build, and finance a new SFMTA bus storage and maintenance facility at 2500 Mariposa Street for $1.396 billion, with construction expected to be completed by 2030. Mandelman voted no; Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Crackdown on Fraudulent Immigration Document Preparers
importantVotes.description: Amends the Police Code to require notaries and immigration consultants who assist with immigration documents to provide clients a list of free or low-cost legal immigration services, and authorizes the Human Rights Commission to assist with complaints against violators. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Board Budget Priorities for FY2026-27 and FY2027-28
importantVotes.description: Establishes the Board of Supervisors' budget priorities and review process for the upcoming two-year budget cycle, guiding how the Board will approach the Mayor's proposed budget. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Twin Peaks Promenade Project — Street Vacation
importantVotes.description: Converts portions of Christmas Tree Point Road and Twin Peaks Boulevard from general roadway right-of-way to recreational right-of-way, facilitating the Twin Peaks Promenade pedestrian improvement project. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Sidewalk Flower Stand Permit Overhaul
importantVotes.description: Updates the city's sidewalk flower stand permit program, including clarifying fees, requiring at least 35 hours of operation per week, and coordinating with the Office of Small Business to identify eligible vendors. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Lutheran Social Services Homelessness Money Management — $15.2M
importantVotes.description: Extends and expands a grant with Lutheran Social Services to provide money management services for homeless individuals, increasing the total to $15.2 million through June 2028. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: 2245 Post Street Special Use District
importantVotes.description: Creates the 2245 Post Street Special Use District with custom zoning to support a specific development project in the Western Addition neighborhood. Fielder was excused.

importantVotes.title: Downtown Activation Location Expansions
importantVotes.description: Expands the city's Downtown Activation Locations program — which allows outdoor activations in alleys and side streets — to include additional blocks of Jessie, Minna, and Natoma Alleys in SoMa. Fielder was excused.
